title: Bartoline PVA Glue Adhesive & Sealer 5L - Multi-Purpose Primer, Adhesive, and Sealer for Concrete, Wood, Tiles, Fabric, and More, Dust-Proofing, Bonding & Sealing (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

MULTI-PURPOSE ADHESIVE & SEALER: Bartoline PVA is perfect for a variety of tasks, from bonding materials like wood, brick, and tiles to sealing porous surfaces such as concrete, plaster, and plasterboard. Versatile and easy to use for many DIY and professional applications.

EFFECTIVE ADHESIVE: Ideal for bonding wood, ceramic tiles, carpet, fabric, leather, and other porous materials. Ensure surfaces are clean and dry before use, then clamp joints for 24 hours to achieve maximum bonding strength for long-lasting adhesion.

HIGH-PERFORMANCE SEALING: Works great as a primer and sealer for porous surfaces like old concrete, plaster, and plasterboard. Dilute with water to prepare these surfaces for further tiling or coatings, ensuring superior adhesion and surface preparation.

IMPROVED CEMENT ADHESION: Mix Bartoline PVA with cement or mortar to improve adhesion and tensile strength for renders. Dilute for larger areas and apply the mixture for enhanced bonding, ideal for both small and large projects.

COST-EFFECTIVE & EASY APPLICATION: A 500ml bottle provides ample coverage for most household and professional jobs. Whether using it as a primer, adhesive, or dust-proofing agent, Bartoline PVA offers great value and efficiency for your tasks.
